rubric_items.description: 1) Create and test a method that accepts the following two parameters: an array of integers and integer n.
2) When the value of n is negative or zero OR when the array of integers is null or empty, the method simply returns a null.
3a) The method returns an array of integers that has a length of n(length - 1) + 1: 3b) The first step is to first copy all the values from the original array to the end of the return array.
3) Inner Loops: multiply the appropriate elements based on how the polynomial is multiplied in the array.
3) Inner Loops: Shift and sum up the coefficients
3) Outer Loop: Repeat the process for n - 1 times.
